source_pr.title: ddl: speed up add index by split handle range from pd region.
source_pr.body:
~~@ciscoxll will benchmark this pr with random handle, so don't merge it before he posts the reports.~~ DONE

@zimulala @coocood @shenli This PR now is ready to be reviewed.

I'll remove addTableIndex function and the corresponding data structure in another PR later.

This PR fix #5192.

symptoms: // The test suite takes too long under the race detector.
failure_signature: // The test suite takes too long under the race detector.
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky around DDL/schema changes where schema propagation is asynchronous. This PR stabilizes it by: ddl: speed up add index by split handle range from pd region.
fix_pattern: ddl: speed up add index by split handle range from pd region.

evidence: evidence: // The test suite takes too long under the race detector.
